raw_output_payload.reasoning: We need bash command: find /testbed -type f -name '*.php' -exec grep -E -c '^[[:alnum:]]+$' {} + | awk -s? task.query: Counts total number of only lines with alphanumeric symbols in all *.php files in the /testbed folder and subfolders.
task.gold: find /testbed -name '*.php' | xargs cat | awk '/[a-zA-Z0-9]/ {i++} END{print i}'
